---
name: "Process improvements — clarify roles, add checklists & templates"
about: "Adds process improvements to docs/ to clarify roles, add checklists and PR/CI guidance"
---

This PR adds targeted process improvements to docs/ to address gaps identified in issue #4 and earlier analysis.

Summary of changes
- Expanded Roles & Personas (Technical Lead, Release Manager, SRE, QA Lead, Data Analyst, Engineering Manager).
- New project-level checklist template to ensure consistency at initiation and execution.
- PR & CI guidance to limit PR size, require CI, and standardize descriptions and acceptance criteria.
- Tighter release checklist with explicit rollback and smoke test steps.
- One-pager template that includes a "Named role-holders" section so each project records who fills each persona.

Files changed
- docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md (updated)
- docs/process-improvements-summary.md (added)
- docs/process-improvements-checklist.md (added)
- docs/pr-and-ci-guidance.md (added)
- docs/release-and-deploy-checklist.md (updated)
- docs/project-onepager-template.md (added)

Related issue: #4

Please review and add any edits or suggestions.
